# Public Text Fixtures

> 状态：CURRENT
> 创建时间：2026-06-16

These files are artificial public fixtures created for `local-doc-viewer`.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `simple-text.txt` | UTF-8 plain text preview smoke fixture |
| `simple-log.log` | UTF-8 log preview smoke fixture |
| `simple-csv.csv` | UTF-8 CSV-as-plain-text preview smoke fixture |
| `simple-markdown.md` | UTF-8 Markdown-as-raw-text preview smoke fixture |

## Privacy And Source

1. The fixture contents were written specifically for this project.
2. They do not contain private user documents, real logs, credentials, customer data, or copied online text.
3. They are safe to keep under `testdata/public/text/`.
4. Markdown fixtures are intentionally rendered as raw text in MVP3.1b; no HTML execution, link navigation, image loading, or network fetch is part of this gate.
